c.d: Total number of active monthly users on the platform, indicating market reach and potential buyer pool
c.s: App store analytics, company reports, market research firms

c.d: Number of different product categories supported for listing items, showing platform versatility
c.s: App documentation, platform guidelines, feature analysis

c.d: Percentage of transaction fees and listing costs charged to sellers, impacting profitability
c.s: Platform pricing pages, seller agreements, fee schedules

c.d: Average time in minutes required to create and publish a new item listing
c.s: User experience testing, platform walkthroughs, user feedback

c.d: Availability of secure payment processing and buyer protection features
c.s: Platform features, security documentation, payment partner information
